request.description: Retrieves the list of transaction categories for the authenticated user.
Creates a new transaction category. 'base_type' must be either 'income' or 'expense'.
Deletes a transaction category. Note: Categories that are already associated with transactions cannot be deleted.
Retrieves the user's transactions based on filters and pagination.

request.description: Retrieves a summary of income, expense, and net values for the specified time filter.
Retrieves detail of a single transaction by its UUID.

request.description: Creates a new transaction. If asset_id is provided, the transaction base_type (income/expense) will automatically increase/decrease the asset's current value. If liability_id is provided, it updates the liability remaining balance. Note that asset balances cannot go below zero.
Updates an existing transaction. Reverts the old transaction's cashflow effect and applies the new cashflow effect.
Deletes a transaction and reverts its cashflow effect on the associated asset or liability.
